structure_patterns: Consistently uses a single, dense paragraph per turn to describe the scene, NPC actions, and player status without breaking into dialogue blocks.
Maintains consistent second-person perspective ('You') throughout all descriptions and actions.
Narrative flows in continuous prose paragraphs rather than using bullet points or distinct headers for actions.
Narrative is continuous and dense; the DM avoids bullet points or explicit scene breaks, instead weaving action, NPC reactions, and environmental details into a single flowing paragraph.
hint_patterns: Embeds significant narrative clues within environmental descriptions that allow players to infer the nature of the captors and the location.
Provides environmental context clues (elven eyes piercing gloom) that suggest player capabilities before the trap triggers, hinting at potential detection methods.
Uses non-verbal cues and environmental details to convey meaning and advance the plot without explicit exposition; relies on player observation of NPC behavior.
formatting_preferences: Consistent use of second-person perspective ('You') with no bolding, italics, or special emphasis markers in the provided text.
Uses standard prose with no bolding, italics, or bullet points; relies on sentence structure for emphasis.
tone: Atmospheric and immersive; uses sensory details (cold, sound, touch) to ground the narrative immediately.
